subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Akbar! The Sun of Permission hath dawned for the Leaf and them that are with her. Execute her command as befitteth, for verily He is the Preserver, the Helper [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر قد اشرق نیر الاذن للورقة من معها و بر امرها بما ینبغی انه هو الحافظ المعین
